description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly white and black color scheme, featuring a streamlined fuselage and sharply angled wings. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the body, with prominent engine nacelles integrated near the wingtips. The nose is pointed and tapers smoothly into the cockpit area, which is enclosed and situated at the front of the fuselage. The tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with visible panel lines and aerodynamic detailing, suggesting advanced engineering and high-speed capability.
description: A futuristic, white and black airplane with swept low-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit at the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, swept wings with engine nacelles visible at the ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the back of the engine nacelles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same wing and tail configuration from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with slight dihedral and integrated engine nacelles near the wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated near the wingtips.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with two main gear units and one nose gear unit visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
